title.en: Ye Tian followed Ji Chi Ancient Demon into this...

content.en:
The territory of the main department of the mother of Aro, the realm of forbidden darkness.

Ye Tian followed Ji Chi Ancient Demon into this treasure land.

As soon as he entered, endless darkness enveloped him, an absolute darkness composed of countless dark ultimate particles.

Even with Ye Tian's strength, it was difficult to see this realm clearly.

"This is the realm of forbidden darkness, there is the power of the ultimate rules of the Dark Extreme Dao here, the ancient demon of the sky, if you want to comprehend here, you can do it, there is no time limit. "

Ji Chi Ancient Demon Dao.

If it was a very precious treasure land, the main department of the Arrow Mother would definitely not be willing to let other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses come in and comprehend.

But the value of this forbidden dark realm is limited, and the main department of Arrow Mother does not attach much importance to it.

For countless years, many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in the main department of Ah Luo's mother came to comprehend, but they didn't realize anything.

This time, it was undoubtedly very cost-effective for the main department of Ah Luo to exchange such a treasure land for a deal for Ye Tian to fight.

In the eyes of the main department of Aluo's mother, they earned money by blood this time, which means that they did not pay any price, and they also found a one-time top thug.

......

After Ji Chi Ancient Demon left, Ye Tian stayed in the Forbidden Darkness Realm to comprehend.

Arrow's main department.

The Ancient Demon knew that Ye Tian had gone to the Forbidden Darkness Realm, she was a little curious why Ye Tian was so interested in a place like the Forbidden Darkness Realm?

If you want to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Dark Pole, how can it be so easy!

Moreover, unconditionally agreeing to the battle requirements of Luo's mother's main department is equivalent to encountering life and death, and Ye Tian must also get it, the price paid is too great.

"Quirky guy!"

The Stygian Ancient Demon muttered.

However, she didn't think too much about it, anyway, this matter was beneficial to Ah Luo's mother's main department, which was equivalent to being beneficial to her, so she wouldn't persuade Ye Tian!

Time flickered, and Ye Tian had been in the Forbidden Darkness Realm for countless years.

He frantically analyzed and deduced, sacrificed a body, and finally succeeded in comprehending the power of the ultimate rules of the Dark Extreme Path on this day.

Immediately afterward, it took him many years to try to integrate the power of the Dark Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule into the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule.

And on this day, he also successfully comprehended, and the ultimate rule of ten thousand laws is one step closer to transformation, and his strength has increased a little bit.

And after he comprehended the ultimate rules of the Dark Pole Path, the Forbidden Darkness Realm was no different from the ordinary world to him, and absolute darkness could not affect him at all.

Immediately, he began to travel in the Forbidden Darkness Realm.

This treasure land has long been looted by the main department of Aluo's mother, so naturally there are no resources.

Ye Tian traveled around, but he didn't find any treasures, only some ordinary resources, which were of no use to an existence like him, and he didn't bother to collect them.

But this day.

Ye Tian was in the depths of the Forbidden Darkness Realm, in a dark pool, but he vaguely sensed the extremely faint fluctuation of the Dark Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule.

If he hadn't comprehended a wisp of the ultimate rule of the Dark Extreme Dao, he would not have discovered it at all.

"There may not be an Ultimate Ancient Demon or a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse in the main department of Aro to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Dark Extreme Dao, they don't seem to pay much attention to this, and it is very likely that they did not find this opportunity. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If it's really a big chance, he'll make a lot of money this time!

So, he reached out and grabbed it, swinging open the ultimate void in front of him. 】

Tear and pull!

The void in front of him was torn open by him, and then he grabbed a black bead in his hand.

"It contains the power of the ultimate rule of the Dark Extreme Path, but it automatically blends into here, if you don't comprehend the ultimate rule of the Extreme Path, you can't perceive its existence at all, it's too deeply hidden!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, he was studying the bead here.

After a period of time, Ye Tian initially comprehended the mystery of this bead.

"Extreme Ultimate Treasure!"

This is a treasure under the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure, and it is also slightly weaker than the pseudo-space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Treasure.

But its value will definitely make the ultimate ancient demons kill each other, and it is incomparably precious.

It can assist Ye Tian to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Dark Extreme Path, such as creating the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane in the Dark Extreme Path, which is a breeze.

And this ultimate treasure of the Extreme Dao also has a huge role - auxiliary combat!

Ye Tian named this bead the Dark Pole Bead, and once the Dark Pole Bead was used, a huge Dark Pole Rule Realm could be formed to suppress the enemy.

With Ye Tian's strength, no amount of peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses could compete with this Dark Extreme Dao Rule Realm.

Even, he had the hope of relying on this Dark Extreme Dao Bead to compete with the weaker Ultimate Ancient Demon, even if he couldn't beat it, there was still hope for his life.

If you make a big profit, you will first refine it thoroughly. "

It was here that Ye Tian began to refine the Dark Pole Dao Bead, and after spending a period of time, he completely fused this Dark Pole Dao Bead.

In the days that followed, he traveled in the Forbidden Darkness Realm again, hoping to find the Ultimate Treasure of the Extreme Path similar to the Dark Polar Bead.

Unfortunately, such an opportunity could not be found again, and he searched for a long time, but did not find a single treasure.

In the end, Ye Tian decided to leave the Forbidden Darkness Realm.

......

Ye Tian left the Forbidden Darkness Realm, and the main department of Ah Luo's mother knew about it, and did not come to him to say anything.

After Ye Tian returned to the Eagle Headquarters, he continued to retreat and cultivate, silently improving his cultivation, and comprehending the ultimate arcane art of the Dark Extreme Path.

After a few more days, Ye Tian finally created an Extreme Ultimate Arcane again.

This Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane is related to the Dark Extreme Path Ultimate Rules, Ye Tian named it the Dark Prison, which is the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane of the Bondage Class, and with the blessing of the Dark (Zhao) Extreme Dao Bead, it can even trap the weaker Ultimate Ancient Demon for a moment.

In short, after creating the Dark Prison and obtaining the Dark Pole Dao Bead, Ye Tian's strength undoubtedly skyrocketed, and he was truly able to push all the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses with his own strength. []

He didn't believe that in this era, there was any other peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who could compete with him, or be able to live in his hands.

......

Arrow's main department.

The ancient demon of Aromu was very annoyed.

"Dom's main department is too much, and he dares to kill several top ancient demon-level powerhouses in our department, a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse. "

The ancient demon of Arromu was furious.

Although the cause was due to a chance, the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in the main department of Dom was so ruthless that he didn't have the slightest sense of keeping his hands at all.

He knew very well that there was no point in finding the ultimate ancient demon theory of the main department of Dom by himself, and he had to get revenge back.
